summary: Iteration 58: Advanced SEO Implementation - All 15 test cases PASSED. Home page has Meril in title, Organization + MedicalBusiness JSON-LD schemas, descriptive hero image alt text. Catalog index has BreadcrumbList + ItemList schemas. Division page (/catalog/trauma) has proper title, canonical, and product images with descriptive alt text. Product detail page has Product schema, OG type=product, canonical with slug. Compare page has noindex meta tag. Dynamic sitemap at /api/seo/sitemap.xml returns valid XML with 500 product URLs and 520 total URLs. robots.txt points to sitemap.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO implementation is complete and working. All catalog pages use react-helmet-async for dynamic meta tags. index.html has static JSON-LD schemas (MedicalBusiness, FAQPage) that are supplemented by page-specific schemas. No duplicate meta tags found. Dynamic sitemap at /api/seo/sitemap.xml includes 500 product URLs.

home_page_seo.details: Title contains 'Meril', 1 meta description, 1 canonical URL (/), Organization + MedicalBusiness JSON-LD schemas, hero image has descriptive alt text

catalog_index_seo.details: Title contains 'Catalog', meta description mentions products/devices, canonical /catalog, BreadcrumbList + ItemList JSON-LD schemas

division_page_seo.details: Title contains 'Trauma', canonical /catalog/trauma, BreadcrumbList + ItemList JSON-LD schemas, product images have descriptive alt text with product name and brand

product_detail_seo.details: Title contains product name 'MBOSS', OG type=product, canonical includes slug, Product + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schemas

compare_page_noindex.details: Compare page has noindex meta tag to prevent indexing

dynamic_sitemap.details: /api/seo/sitemap.xml returns valid XML with 500 product URLs and 520 total URLs (static pages + divisions + products + districts)

no_duplicate_meta_description.details: All pages have exactly 1 meta description tag

no_duplicate_canonical.details: All pages have exactly 1 canonical tag
